All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

E

empty() - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventFilterCriteria
Returns a new criteria instance with all fields at default (no filtering beyond screen rules).
enlargeSmallTouchTargets(Context, View) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.AccessibilityUtils
Walks every view in the hierarchy rooted at the given root view and, for any view that is clickable or focusable and smaller than 48 dp in either dimension, raises its minimum size to 48 dp.
ensureRegistered(Context) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantNotificationBridge
Attaches the Firestore notification listener if it is not already active.
Entrant - Class in com.example.eventlottery
This class models an entrant (user) profile stored in Firestore at users/{deviceId}.
Entrant() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.Entrant
No-arg constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
Entrant(String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.Entrant
Constructs an entrant with core profile fields; notifications default to enabled.
Entrant(String, String, String, String, String, Double, Double, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.Entrant
Constructs an entrant with profile and optional geolocation fields.
EntrantHistoryScreenActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Entrant history: events this user has joined (has waitingList doc).
EntrantHistoryScreenActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantHistoryScreenActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.
EntrantHistoryScreenAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Adapter for EntrantHistoryScreenActivity: events user has joined, with status.
EntrantHistoryScreenAdapter(Context, ArrayList<Event>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantHistoryScreenAdapter
this is the constructor for the entrant history adapter
EntrantMainScreenActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Entrant home: lists events from Firestore with optional filters (keyword, type, distance, registration open).
EntrantMainScreenActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantMainScreenActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.
EntrantMainScreenAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Adapter for event list on EntrantMainScreenActivity.
EntrantMainScreenAdapter(Context, ArrayList<Event>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantMainScreenAdapter
Creates a new EntrantMainScreenAdapter.
EntrantMapActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Shows events with coordinates using the same EventFilterCriteria as the home list (registration-open filter when enabled; distance needs location — toast if unavailable).
EntrantMapActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantMapActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.
EntrantNotificationBridge - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Single Firestore listener on users/{deviceId}/notifications so organizer-sent notifications (via NotificationHelper) also post as high-importance OS alerts whenever the app process is alive — not only while EntrantMainScreenActivity is on screen.
EntrantNotificationsActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Shows in-app notifications from Firestore.
EntrantNotificationsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantNotificationsActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.
EntrantNotificationsAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlottery
List rows for EntrantNotificationsActivity.
EntrantNotificationsAdapter(Context, ArrayList<InAppNotification>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantNotificationsAdapter
Creates a new EntrantNotificationsAdapter.
EntrantProfileActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
 
EntrantProfileActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantProfileActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.
EntrantSetupActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
 
EntrantSetupActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantSetupActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.
Event - Class in com.example.eventlottery
This class models an event in the Event Lottery app.
Event() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.Event
No-arg constructor; initializes selectionCriteria and coOrganizerIds to empty lists.
Event(String, String, String, String, String, String, int, int, long, long, long, boolean, double) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Full constructor for core event fields (excludes promoCode, posterUri, selectionCriteria lists).
EventDetailsActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Event details and join/leave waiting list (US 01.01.01, 01.01.02, 01.06.02).
EventDetailsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EventDetailsActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.
EventEditActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Create/edit event screen (US 02.01.01, 02.01.02, 02.01.04, 01.05.05).
EventEditActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EventEditActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.
EventFilterCriteria - Class in com.example.eventlottery
This class holds entrant-side filter criteria for the event list and map screens.
EventFilterCriteria() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EventFilterCriteria
Creates a new EventFilterCriteria with all fields at their default (no filtering).
EventFilterDialogFragment - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Dialog to edit EventFilterCriteria; posts result on Apply/Clear.
EventFilterDialogFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EventFilterDialogFragment
No-arg constructor required by the Fragment framework.
EventFilterUtils - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Applies EventFilterCriteria to events, including optional distance from the user.
EventFirestoreParser - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Maps Firestore event documents to Event (shared by list + map screens).
EventLocationFragment - Class in com.example.eventlottery
 
EventLocationFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EventLocationFragment
Creates a new EventLocationFragment and binds it to the geolocation layout.
EventLotteryApp - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Registers the notification channel once and attaches the global entrant notification bridge.
EventLotteryApp() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EventLotteryApp
No-arg constructor required by the Android Application lifecycle.
EventMapClusterItem - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Map marker / cluster leaf for an Event with coordinates.
EventMapClusterItem(double, double, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.EventMapClusterItem
Creates a new map cluster item for the given event coordinates.
EventRepository - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Singleton holding a "current" event for organizer flows.
EXTRA_EVENT_ID - Static variable in class com.example.eventlottery.CoOrganizerManagementActivity
Intent extra key for the event ID passed to this activity.
EXTRA_EVENT_ID - Static variable in class com.example.eventlottery.EventDetailsActivity
Intent extra key for the Firestore event ID to load.
EXTRA_EVENT_ID - Static variable in class com.example.eventlottery.EventEditActivity
Intent extra key for the Firestore event ID to edit (null means create new event).
EXTRA_EVENT_ID - Static variable in class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerInviteEntrantActivity
 
EXTRA_EVENT_ID - Static variable in class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerNotificationLogActivity
 
EXTRA_EVENT_ID - Static variable in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeActivity
 
EXTRA_FILTER - Static variable in class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantMapActivity
Intent extra key for the serialised EventFilterCriteria passed to this activity.
EXTRA_VIEW_AS_ENTRANT - Static variable in class com.example.eventlottery.EventDetailsActivity
When true, toolbar is white (entrant view); when false, black (organizer view).
